mapper.select: select emp_id as employeeId,sum(value) as holidayTime,field_name as holidayType,'1' as timeUnit FROM hrm_attendance_report_data WHERE field_name in ('病假','哺乳假','事假') and work_date BETWEEN #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by emp_id ,field_name union all select emp_id as employeeId,sum(value) as holidayTime,field_name as houlidayType,'2' as timeUnit FROM hrm_attendance_report_data WHERE field_name in ('产假','产检假','婚假','年假','陪产假','丧假','调休') and work_date BETWEEN #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by emp_id ,field_name

select T1.emp_id as employeeId,case when T1.normalDays-ifnull(T2.days,0)<=0 then 0 else T1.normalDays-ifnull(T2.days,0) end as normalDays,actualityDays from ( SELECT emp_id, sum(CASE WHEN field_name='出勤天数' THEN value ELSE 0 END) actualityDays , sum(CASE WHEN field_name='应出勤天数' THEN value ELSE 0 END) normalDays FROM hrm_attendance_report_data t1 where work_date BETWEEN #{beginDate} and #{endDate} GROUP BY emp_id ) T1 left join ( select ifnull(count(1),0) as days,emp_id FROM hrm_attendance_report_data WHERE field_name='考勤结果' and `value`='' and work_date BETWEEN #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and DAYOFWEEK(work_date) IN (1,7) group by emp_id ) T2 on T1.emp_id = T2.emp_id WHERE (T1.normalDays-ifnull(T2.days,0))>0
